title: Kasam
subTitle: Tanvi suspects Pawan to have entered Rishi's room and she informs Rishi about it. Later, when Rishi and Manpreet meet the pandit who performed Pawan and Saloni's wedding, they get enough evidence to prove Pawan's deception.

title: Kasam
subTitle: Pawan plans to kill Rishi by pushing his car over a bridge. However, while talking to Rishi over the phone, Tanvi has an intuition about Rishi being in danger. Pawan's plan then goes accordingly and Rishi gets wounded.

title: Kasam
subTitle: Pawan takes Rishi's phone with him and when Tanvi tries to contact Rishi, she gets extremely worried. Later, Rishi forces himself up from the hospital bed and meets Manpreet to try and find some evidence against Pawan.

title: Kasam
subTitle: Rishi goes to the Kali temple to seek inspiration and strength as he tries to find ways to get closer to Tanu. Seeing Tanu alone, Pawan takes advantage of the situation and questions her attempts to call Rishi while reminding her of her obligations.

subTitle: Rishi and Tanvi grow closer to each other after his accident, and Manpreet uses this as a chance to tease them. Later, while playing 'passing the parcel,' Rishi picks up Pawan to dance with him. While dancing, Pawan falls down.

title: Kasam
subTitle: Tanu is enraged after she sees Rishi getting cosy with Tara. Flustered, Rishi tries to convince Tanu and swears his undying love for her. Later, Bani tries to manipulate Rano, as she overhears her and Savitri discuss Pawan and Tanu's alliance.

title: Kasam
subTitle: Rano tells Raj that she wants Tanu as their daughter-in-law as she feels that Rishi is head over heels in love with her. Elsewhere, Pawan thanks Saloni for her convincing act and agrees to get her the diamond set he had promised her.

title: Kasam
subTitle: While everyone is eating the malpua's made by Tanu, Rishi is fasting so that he can get his love. Later, Pawan, Tanu, Rishi and Neha are joined by Saloni as they go shopping for jewellery. While shopping, Saloni and Pawan's actions cause suspicion.

title: Kasam
subTitle: While Neha is busy looking for the heaviest Mangal Sutra, Tanu gets a simple one. Meanwhile, Rishi sees Pawan and Saloni holding hands outside the shop. Later, Tanu stops Rishi from helping her try on a Mangal Sutra, explaining its significance.
